headline: WWE and White Hat Studios Deliver WrestleMania: Road to Gold Exclusively to Fanatics Casino
summary: New Official Branded Slot Is Powered By 20 WWE Superstars and Flagship WWE EventsNEW YORK, March 12, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- WWE®, part of TKO Group Holdings (NYSE: TKO), and White Hat Studios announced the official branded slot, WrestleMania®: Road to Gold, will launch exclusively with Fanatics Casino beginning today.
